calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-01-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Respondent/Plaintiff Roderick Coleman appeared in pro per.
Appellant/Defendant Metropolitan Fresh Start House appeared in pro per represented by Rod Kearney.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Parties and witnesses for Appellant Sam Devore and Raymond Townsel sworn.

Respondent Mr. Coleman files a declaration of change of address.

Respondent/Plaintiff Roderick Coleman testified on his own behalf.
Mr. Kearney testified on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Metropolitan Fresh Start House.
Mr. Townsel testified on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Metropolitan Fresh Start House.

The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Appellant/Defendant's Group Exhibit A: Documents including intake form and cardinal rules and policy; photos of interior of room.
Respondent/Plaintiff's Group Exhibit 1: Documents including letter dated March 1, 2019, from Casalina and Disston, Attorneys at Law;

Respondent's and Appellant's exhibits retained by the Court.

The matter is taken under submission.
Dept. 525; Judge Pro Tem: Elliott Myles; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-28-2019 Judgment Entered
